subject: [CLASSIFIED] New Mutation Report
bodyHtml:
[CLASSIFIED - LEVEL IV ACCESS]

Anomalous Fauna Registry - Entry #001

Designation: CHABLIS
Known Alias: "The Ninefold Gale"
Species Origin: Pavo mutatus
Class: Ventus

Last Recorded Location: Northern shore of Lake Kawaguchi, Yamanashi Prefecture, Japan
Mutation Index: 9
Threat Level: Extreme

Physical Description: Large avian entity with nine cranial structures.

Behavioral Notes: Capable of rapid repositioning. Further wind-pressure data is redacted.

Internal Directive: Do not engage during high wind conditions.
